problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
